title: Malcore alert related file
content:
This playbook fetch a malcore alert from a GCenter, retrieve the associated suspicious file and checks the SHA256 reputation using VirusTotal integration.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Gatewatcher pack (Gatewatcher-AionIQ, partner-supported).

Integrations/scripts used: GCenter 103.
